proposed_artifacts.content:
# Redacted Complaint Draft

## Introduction
This complaint is submitted on behalf of A.E., a student at Edinburgh Napier University, regarding accommodation arrears and related issues.

## Background
A.E. is a student with matriculation number [REDACTED]. The university has pursued arrears of £5526.66 as of 20 April 2026.

## Financial Circumstances
A.E.'s bank statement for the period 01/09/2025 to 28/04/2026 shows total outgoings of £19,057.59 and total deposits of £19,057.88. Specific transaction details have been redacted for privacy.

## Legal Arguments
[Remaining legal arguments unchanged, with personal identifiers redacted as above.]

## Conclusion
[Conclusion unchanged, with personal identifiers redacted.]

risk_flags.text: Incomplete redaction could expose personal data; verify all occurrences of name, matriculation number, and transaction details are replaced.
